'''Etorasp''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Hakartha sector/Legends|Hakartha sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

After the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] took [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Marutz]] to a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] cell on Etorasp. From there, Marutz was taken to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] to be interrogated by Vader. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] acquired a naval card on Etorasp to get onto the Star Destroyer. He sabotaged a critical ship component to distract Vader while he freed Marutz and the two Rebels escaped.<ref name="Yoda Stories">''[[Star Wars: Yoda Stories]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Yoda Stories]]''
